title: Allay Totem of Undying
description:
simple remodel of totem of undying into shape of an Allay mob

[the resourcepack will be ported to newer versions but won't get any new things]
-S4Ik0_
body:
This pack changes totem of undying into Allay of undying that flies near your shoulder to make sure you never die in game

/!\ [IMPORTANT] /!\
this is not a random reupload but port form CF to Modrinth
please do not report it as stolen
